channel.title: Sports
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Sports, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Sound Smart: 3 Observations From Super Bowl LX
item.description: Breaking down the biggest talking points from the Seahawks' dominant win versus the Patriots in Super Bowl LX.

item.title: Klint Kubiak Confirms He Will Be the Las Vegas Raiders Next Head Coach
item.description: Klint Kubiak officially announced his plans to become the Las Vegas Raiders' next head coach.

item.title: Big Time Facts That Define Seahawks' Dominant Super Bowl LX Win Over Patriots
item.description: The Seahawks won Super Bowl LX in dominant fashion. Here are some facts and stats that define their victory over the Patriots.

item.title: The Big Picture: Super Bowl LX a Baptism By Fire For Drake Maye, Patriots
item.description: The Patriots may have been crushed in Super Bowl LX, but with Drake Maye and Mike Vrabel, they've got the ingredients for many more Super runs.

item.title: 10 Burning Questions That Will Define the NFL Offseason
item.description: What's next for the Seahawks and Patriots? Who's the next surprise team? With Super Bowl LX in the books, it's time to look forward.

item.title: Men's Bubble Watch: Iowa's inch to lock status, more results from a packed weekend
item.description: Iowa, USC pulled out wins but Ohio State, UCF, West Virginia, Tulsa have work to do after a mixed bubble Sunday.

item.title: Bracketology: Saint Louis could be a real threat come March
item.description: The Billikens are an analytical unicorn -- and shaping up to be the Atlantic 10's next generational team.

item.title: What this NBA trade deadline revealed: Teams are finding new ways to tank
item.description: Much to the irritation of some league insiders, the trade deadline was more than just a flurry of moves: It showed the next evolution in teams racing ...

item.title: Play-in push or lottery pick? What's ahead for Giannis and the Milwaukee Bucks
item.description: Giannis Antetokounmpo is still on the Bucks. What's next for Milwaukee and its superstar?

item.title: Baseball is back! The stars, teams and themes we can't wait to see in spring training
item.description: Here's what has us most excited as MLB players report this week to Arizona and Florida.
